allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\Dev\\RingDesigner"; $job = Start-Job { Set-Location "D:\\Dev\\RingDesigner"; python -m http.server 7844 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 3; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:7844" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\saifu\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\ring-designer-screenshot.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:7842/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - server is up, served $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:7842/js/exporter.js' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - serving latest exporter.js \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server not responding: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:7842/js/painter.js' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - painter.js $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "Server down: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:7842/js/mapbox.js' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - mapbox.js $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "Server down: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
